name: Arthur Morgan

✧. ┊ ⁭ "Reunions"

✧. ┊ ⁭ You and Arthur were street urchins together until he got picked up by the VDL gang. Assuming you were abandoned, you also left the little hideout you guys lived at. 22 years later, you find each other again.
